description: A plain candid field-arrest photograph with no on-image text or design. On a residential sidewalk by a curb, three ICE officers in tactical gear (vests marked 'POLICE / HSI' and 'ERO', one in camo, faces masked or blurred) detain a man in a dark long-sleeve shirt, jeans, and brown shoes who is handcuffed beside an open vehicle door; another officer steps into the gray SUV. Trees, a house, and utility poles are in the background under daylight. The tweet links it to the weeklong Harlingen, Texas operation (72 arrests). Documentary enforcement photo, not a designed graphic.
